question.label: Concept rationale
question.name: Concept rationale — what does stronger work there look like to you?
question.description: Drills into the specific growth area he named so the gap becomes concrete and discussable.

answer: A tighter loop on one skill at a time would help me improve.

assessment.note: Names a missing feedback structure — a tighter loop on one skill at a time — which is a strong clarity deficit; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] tighter loop on one skill at a time.

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is getting in the way of the next skill you want to build?

new_queue.label: Two-week focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
I would like to grow faster in concept rationale, not just execution speed.

I sometimes focus on polish and lose sight of the core message.
